content.speakerText: Do you have any ongoing promotions this week?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周有什么持续促销活动吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we have a weekly sale on dairy products — 20% off all cheese and yogurt.
There's a flash sale on fruits and vegetables every Friday.
We don't have fixed promotions, but signing up for our app gives you exclusive weekly deals.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明是否有促销及具体内容
语言准确性：使用恰当时态（现在进行时、一般现在时）和促销术语
表达自然度：包含场景关键词如 'weekly sale', 'flash sale', 'exclusive deals', 'signing up'
